fixes_this_run: CONFIDENCE_RANGE_ENGINE_EXTENDED: GraduatedRule.matches() now accepts confidence param + checks confidence_min/confidence_max conditions. evaluate_signal() passes confidence to matches(). 5/5 boundary tests pass.
BTC_SHORT_CONF70_80_BLOCK: btc_short_conf70_80_block_v1 added to data/llm/graduated_rules.json. Conf=90%, 20 evidence. Vetos BTC SELL at 70-79.9% confidence at Gate 1g.
corrections_this_run: AB_TRACKING_BROKEN (CRITICAL anomaly from daily_synthesis_2026-05-03) IS FALSE. evaluate_active_fixes() in bot/learning/auto_fix_pipeline.py is FULLY IMPLEMENTED (lines 106-243). The code splits trades by ab_gate_hash, computes treatment/control WR, auto-reverts on -3pp delta, promotes on +2pp delta, writes back to graduated_rules.json. The 'TODO stub' finding was incorrect.

CONFIDENCE_RANGE_SUPPORT_GAP.root_cause: GraduatedRule.matches() had no confidence_min/confidence_max condition support. BTC_SHORT_CONF70_80_BLOCK and similar confidence-bin rules could not be enforced at runtime even if added to graduated_rules.json.
CONFIDENCE_RANGE_SUPPORT_GAP.fix: Added confidence param to matches(), added confidence_min/max condition checks. Two-line extension, fully backward compatible.
CONFIDENCE_RANGE_SUPPORT_GAP.impact: BTC SHORT at 70-79.9% confidence now vetoed at Gate 1g. This was the worst loss bucket per orphan rule analysis (conf=90%).

AB_TRACKING_BROKEN.previous_finding: daily_synthesis_2026-05-03 flagged evaluate_active_fixes() as TODO stub
AB_TRACKING_BROKEN.reality: Function is fully implemented. Reads graduated_rules.json A/B_ACTIVE rules, splits trades by ab_gate_hash, computes treatment_wr vs control_wr, auto-reverts at -3pp, promotes at +2pp. Awaiting live trade data to run — not a code bug.

night_session_block.finding: NIGHT_SESSION_ESCALATE (conf=88%, 19% WR on 27 trades, -$136.83) cannot be added to data/llm/graduated_rules.json yet. The engine and signal_pipeline.py don't pass hour_utc to evaluate_signal(). Requires: (1) add hour_utc_min/hour_utc_max to matches(), (2) pass datetime.utcnow().hour in signal_pipeline Gate 1g call.
